items.body:
Reservation Confirmation

Dates & Details:
Check-in: Mar 29, 2026 at 4:00 PM
Check-out: Apr 01, 2026 at 10:00 AM
Nights: 3
Guests: 2

If anything is incorrect, please let me know ASAP so I can update it before arrival.

Address:
150 Sunset Ave, Palm Beach, FL 33480
https://www.google.com/maps/place/26.72010,-80.03819

Parking:
Street parking is available on a first-come basis. Driveway parking is limited to registered vehicles.

WIFI:
Network name: WorkTripWiFi
Password: QuietHours
House Rules:
No smoking or parties/events
Quiet hours: 11:00 PM - 8:00 AM

Hi,

Thanks for booking with us! Your door code is 4024. The code activates at 4 PM on check-in day. Please use the smart lock at the main entrance and message us if you have any trouble.
Hello, we booked this stay because my mother has a follow-up treatment at St. Mary's Medical Center. We may need a quiet afternoon to rest after the procedure.
Understood. We will keep things quiet and can provide extra pillows if needed. Wishing a smooth appointment.
Please send a quick message after you arrive so we can make sure everything is perfect for your stay.
